chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA 1st. Cr. Bail Application No. S- 755 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection-A. 2. For hearing of bail application. 04.02.2025. Mr. Asif Ali A Sandilo, Advocate for the Applicant. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh ------------ Since, applicant has been acquitted in pursuance of section 265-K Cr.PC vide order dated 27.1.2025 by Assistant Sessions Judge-1, Larkana, such copy of order has been placed on the record. The very purpose of the applicant has been served. Therefore, application stands disposed of having become infructuous. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
